headline: These 2 Dividend Growers Are Aggressively Buying Back Shares - And I'm Buying Too
summary: T-Mobile US and OTIS Worldwide are both down over 25% in the past year, creating long-term buying opportunities. Learn more about TMUS and OTIS stocks here.
